title: Specify.toml framework authoring config
description: Validates the framework repo authoring blueprint at Specify.toml — how to build and check adapters, skills, and rules. Distinct from runtime .specify/project.yaml.

version.description: Which specify binary channel to bind: next (sibling checkout), latest (newest published release), or an exact semver pin.

binary.description: Repo-local executable path materialized by scripts/specify.sh (parent directory is gitignored).

path.description: Optional directory on PATH; make install-specify symlinks path/specify to binary.
